name: swoosh
description: Intent-driven, policy-driven model routing for TypeScript.

scripts.build: bun run --filter='swoosh-router' build && bun run --filter='swoosh-ai-sdk' build && bun run --filter='swoosh-capabilities' build && bun run --filter='swoosh-judge' build && bun run --filter='swoosh-sdk' build
scripts.docs: bun run build && bun run scripts/gen-llms.ts
